---
title: "About"
---

The *Theory Methods Society* is presided by a democratically elected board:

* **Chair:** Caspar van Lissa
* **Vice-chair:** Noah van Dongen
* **Treasurer:** Jason Nak
* **Operations manager:** Luiza Yuan
* **Communications Manager:** Ward Eiling


## Code of Conduct

By participating in the *Theory Methods Society*, you agree to adhere to the [Contributor Covenant](https://www.contributor-covenant.org/), a code of conduct designed to ensure safety and accountability in communities.

<p align="center">

<img src="TMS_logo.png" alt="TMS logo" style="max-width:160px;width:40%;min-width:100px;height:auto;"/>

</p>

{{< include bylaws.md >}}
